extra.reason: Implemented the V1 local-first foundation: Rust CLI/workspace, SQLite storage, four local importers, pricing snapshot/overrides, SSH remote configuration with read-only discovery, embedded React/Vite dashboard, tests, validation, and turn documentation. Follow-up remote import and fixture hardening are tracked separately.

Fixed Codex token_count accounting by reading payload.info.last_token_usage as the event increment, splitting cached input from non-cached input for Codex rows, and adding regression coverage. Validation: cargo test -p dirtydash; temp import produced Codex 30d base-rate estimate .05.

Fixed imported Codex/pi-agent spend undercounting by parsing nested usage, using source-reported costs, aliasing Codex/OpenAI pricing identifiers, updating stale imported rows on reimport, adding regressions, and updating the dashboard to surface unpriced tokens.

Resolved PR #2 merge conflicts by merging origin/main into lavender/accounting-diff-investigation, preserving both importer fixes in importers.rs, keeping Beads records from both sides, and validating with cargo fmt --check, cargo test -p dirtydash, and dashboard build.
Clarified cache read share semantics in the dashboard and API, documented cache-write limitations, and validated build/test/browser smoke checks.
Implemented model-only display labels, kept fast-mode slugs separate, refreshed Cursor-aligned bundled pricing, and added regression coverage.
Codex low-effort GPT 5.5 and GPT 5.4 usage now imports as fast model slugs, with regression coverage and local re-import validation.

implemented codexbar-style codex pricing modes, local logs_2 priority evidence, priority aggregate splits, shared fast usage bars, pricing-page usage bars, tests, visual checks, and turn documentation. broader codexbar 30-day reconciliation remains tracked by dirtydash-q9g.
aligned Dirtydash Codex source coverage, priority pricing, and dashboard token summaries with CodexBar; filed dirtydash-ejj for remaining fork-baseline nuance
restored fast/priority usage repair and chart highlighting
Added dashboard copy that separates Codex fast-mode subscription drain from cache-read/API-style cost estimates.
Added deploy script, deployment docs, validation, and turn record.
Deploy script now prompts for local versus remote mode, keeps explicit mode flags, and docs are updated.
Merged PR #3 and PR #4 into the fast-mode chart branch, resolved dashboard and Beads conflicts, and preserved all PR changes.
Added four TUI-inspired mockup routes with hotkeys, responsive panes, validation, and turn documentation.
Implemented the production TUI dashboard redesign with date-descending daily ledger, selected-day sessions API, validation, and turn documentation.
Fixed chart tooltip hover behavior, chronological chart order, y-axis labels, and selected-day sessions spacing.
Version metadata bumped to v0.1.1 and validated with cargo test plus dashboard build.
Implemented arrow-key selection navigation, fixed the app shell to a single viewport, rebuilt dashboard assets, verified with build, tests, and headless Chrome.
Restored explicit Ledger panel placement within the fixed viewport and verified all four Ledger panels render at desktop, medium, and narrow widths without document scroll.
